title: Creating Files & Folders
description: Time to make your mark! Create some files and folders on your Linux desktop.

steps.instruction: Right-click on the desktop and select 'New Folder' to create a new folder.
steps.hint: Right-click on any empty area of the desktop, then click 'New Folder' in the menu.

steps.instruction: Nice folder! Now open the Terminal from the dock (⬛) — let's create a file the Linux way!
steps.hint: Click the Terminal icon (⬛) in the dock on the left side.

steps.instruction: In the Terminal, type: touch hello.txt — This creates an empty file called hello.txt!
Now type: ls — to see your new file listed in the current directory!
steps.hint: Type 'ls' and press Enter to list files.
